title: Compare Two Datasets Side by Side in Datilio
summary: Upload two related files, align columns, and compare metrics with filters and charts.

content.summary: Upload two related files, align columns, and compare metrics with filters and charts.

body.text: Month-over-month and plan-vs-actual reviews often mean two files. Datilio helps you compare without fragile VLOOKUP sheets. Upload each CSV with matching column names for keys and metrics. Preview both to confirm types align—especially dates and currency.

body.alt: Charts and graphs for business reporting
body.caption: Charts and graphs for business reporting. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Upload each CSV with matching column names for keys and metrics. Preview both to confirm types align—especially dates and currency.
Apply identical saved filter rules to each upload so comparisons use the same business logic.

items: Use consistent grain—daily vs weekly breaks comparisons.
Document which file is baseline vs current period.
Watch for renamed columns between exports.

body.text: Chart the same measure from each filtered subset. Note deltas in Talk to Data with explicit period labels.
Export comparison views for finance review meetings with filters documented in rule names.
Side-by-side analysis in Datilio beats error-prone spreadsheet merges for recurring operational comparisons.

meta_description: Upload two related files, align columns, and compare metrics with filters and charts.
